Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1956 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Pro Boxing (Artworx).prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $9400 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $9000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pro Boxing (Artworx).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
To remove the long delay when starting the game and display the loading screen, a routine was added at 9000 which:
1. Copies 768 bytes of data from $90B0 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 2. Displays the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game 3. Sets up the correct VICII settings for the game itself 4. Sets the stack pointer to $F5 5. Hides the cursor by setting $CC 6. Jumps to the entry point at $1956 (it could not use RTS because of the stack being changed above in step 1)
Also restored screen RAM from $0400-$07E7 and removed the "DO NOT REMOVE DISK" message from the loading screen.
Note: to dump the game, set a breakpoint on $1956 after the loading screen is displayed and wait for the stack pointer (SP) to be $F5.
